creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-11-25 08:27:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-MooseX-Attribute-ENV Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  MooseX-Attribute-ENV is a Moose attribute trait that you use when
  you want the default value for an attribute to be populated from
  the %ENV hash.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/MooseX-Attribute-ENV/
  
  PR:             ports/152408
  Submitted by:   Alan Snelson <Alan@Wave2.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4143    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Attribute-ENV/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Attribute-ENV/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Attribute-ENV/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Attribute-ENV/pkg-plist (new)
